Notes.Text:
This update for graphite2 fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2026-50593: Out-of-bounds write via Graphite actions (bsc#1267733).

Vulnerabilities.Description: Graphite before 1.3.15 has an integer underflow and resultant out-of-bounds write via Graphite actions, because slotat does not ensure that an offset is within the allowed slot-map range.
